data.title: Apollo Scooters Launches the City 2.0 and City Stellar Commuter Electric Scooters; Pre-Orders Open
data.description: Apollo Scooters has reintroduced their popular commuter electric scooter, now equipped with the complete Apollo Signature features. Pre-orders for the updated model will commence on July 2, 2026, with expected shipping in the fourth quarter of the same year. The company, based in MONTRÉAL, shared the news on this date, indicating that interested customers can place orders for the two new commuter electric scooters.

data.title: Ondo enhances tokenized equities with onchain voting for shareholders, amid rising competition in blockchain equity.
data.description: Ondo has recently forged a new collaboration that incorporates shareholder governance into tokenized stocks, heightening competition in the realm of blockchain-based equity offerings. This development underscores the increasing importance of transparency and investor participation in the digital asset space, especially as the number of companies exploring tokenization continues to rise.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Portuguese Cork Association (APCOR)/
data.description: The significance of Cork in the realm of contemporary art has been showcased in "The Reflection of Bronze" by Giuseppe Penone at the Gagosian Gallery in New York. This announcement was made on 30-Jun-2026 by the Portuguese Cork Association (APCOR) through a press release. The exhibition emphasizes Cork's role in modern art and aims to highlight its versatility and appeal to a global audience. This event marks a milestone for APCOR, as it underlines the growing influence and recognition of Cork as a material for artistic expression.

data.title: Continental Battery Systems Turns Used Batteries into New Opportunities Through Recycling Program
data.description: In Dallas, Continental Battery Systems is emphasizing its enduring battery recycling and recovery program within the automotive aftermarket industry. The initiative aims to bolster a sustainable battery supply chain by retrieving, examining, refurbishing, and recycling previously used batteries. Juan Sierra, the Senior VP Supply Chain at Continental Battery Systems, expressed the objective of preventing batteries from ending up in landfills. He conveyed that each collected battery undergoes tests for potential reuse, reconditioning, or integration back into the recycling process. This program underscores the commitment of Continental Battery Systems towards environmental responsibility and efficient resource management.

data.title: Statement from Shatterproof on DEA's Temporary Scheduling of 7-Hydroxymitragynine (7-OH) and Related Substances
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Washington, the organization Shatterproof praised the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration's move to temporarily regulate 7-hydroxymitragynine (7-OH) and similar substances. This action is crucial in combatting the quick spread of potent substances in the country.

data.title: Avangrid Designated 2026 Military Friendly Employer During America’s 250th Anniversary
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company and part of the Iberdrola Group, has been recognized as a 2026 Military Friendly Employer by Military Friendly. This designation evaluates organizations based on their dedication, initiatives, and accomplishments in providing valuable benefits for the military community. Celebrating America's 250th anniversary, Avangrid acknowledges the significance of supporting military members and their families.

data.title: In HelloNation, Roofing Expert Jesse Curry Highlights Missing Shingles, Recurring Leaks, Sagging Roof, and More
data.description: Reported from Sarasota, Florida on July 2, 2026, an article delineates indicators that suggest a roof is approaching the conclusion of its durability. Homeowners seeking insights on these signs can refer to a resourceful HelloNation article.

data.title: Insurance Expert Nathan Marcus of Birmingham, Alabama, Breaks Down Storm Coverage for HelloNation
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on July 2, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation examines the storm coverage available to homeowners in the area. Insurance Expert Nathan Marcus from The Marcus Agency provides insights on the types of coverage available for tornadoes, floods, and severe weather. The article delves into specifics on the insurance options homeowners have in Birmingham to protect their properties against these natural disasters.

data.title: TruTrade Highlights Growing Demand for Funded Trading Accounts Through QuickFund
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Scottsdale, Arizona, it was reported that the popularity of funded trading accounts is increasing as access to trading capital plays a crucial role in financial market participation. Traders are looking for options beyond personal capital reliance. This trend is driven by the desire for alternatives in trading.

data.title: IPA Applauds Introduction of the Informed Investor Access Act
data.description: In a statement released today, the Institute for Portfolio Alternatives (IPA) praised U.S. Rep. Troy Downing for his introduction of the Informed Investor Access Act. This proposed legislation aims to update the accredited investor system by establishing a fresh avenue for investors. The IPA commended Rep. Downing for his efforts in this regard.

data.title: Ideagen Named a Leader in Independent Research Firm's Process Safety Management Software Report
data.description: In Nottingham, England, Ideagen's emphasis on AI in process safety management earns them recognition in the 2026 Verdantix Green Quadrant Report. The company is classified as a ‘Leader’. CEO of Ideagen, Ben Dorks, expressed pride in this achievement, noting that this is the third instance in six months where Ideagen Mazlan has been acknowledged as a prominent AI player across various sectors including quality management, GRC, and now, process safety. Dorks highlighted the intentional strategy underlying this pattern of consistent recognition.

data.title: SKY DOCUMENTARIES TO PREMIERE LANDMARK FILM AMERIGO: THE SEARCH FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM ON INDEPENDENCE DAY
data.description: In anticipation of America's upcoming 250th anniversary, a comprehensive documentary explores the fate of the American Dream. Set to be premiered in the UK and Ireland by Sky Documentaries on July 2, 2026, "AMERIGO: The..." delves into this enduring question.
